steps.title: Recognize the square
steps.content:
The right side is the product of $22$ with itself:
$$
(22)(22)=22^2
$$
So the equation is $x^2=22^2$.

steps.title: Use the positive solution
steps.content: The solutions are $x=22$ and $x=-22$, but the question asks for the positive solution.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the equation or solve it directly to find the positive value. The answer is 22.
